title: How Is the Economy Doing Right Now?
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The economy is generally strong with slowing inflation, but unemployment is rising slightly. Real GDP grew by 0.5% in Q4 2025.
excerpt: The economy is generally strong with slowing inflation, but unemployment is rising slightly. Real GDP grew by 0.5% in Q4 2025.

content.introduction: The economy is generally strong with slowing inflation, but unemployment is rising slightly. Real GDP grew by 0.5% in Q4 2025.
body: The state of the economy is generally strong and inflation is slowing down, but still remains elevated.
Inflation outside of gas and air travel are starting to trend upward slowly as unemployment is starting to trend upward. People have more wealth
Real gross domestic product (GDP) increased at an annual rate of 0.5 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 (October, November, and December),
keyTakeaways: The economy is generally strong with slowing inflation, but unemployment is rising slightly. Real GDP grew by 0
The state of the economy is generally strong and inflation is slowing down, but still remains elevated.
Inflation outside of gas and air travel are starting to trend upward slowly as unemployment is starting to trend upward.
